title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for a period between 25th May 2010 and 26th June 2010

"qj. -VIII] q iHt, 3747 /Ti---4a 1:117 fCifW 16 174, 2010*-1' 3-TFIRITi1 # 7IT:Wifff. 195( 3T) tif* 17 1:11, 2010 *-1 v1Trd * tNt44 (31#TWIT), TIM II, (Aus 3, 31:1-t.gu s (i) Tl 514.4cf f*//1 7711 eTT 1903 GI/2010 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th May, 2010 G.S.R. 420(E). In partial modification of this Ministry's Notification No. G.S.R. 195(E) dated 16th March, 2010 (F. No. 674/1/2005-Cus.-VIII) and in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), the Central Government hereby re-constitutes an Advisory Board for a period with effect from 25th May, 2010 to 26th June, 2010, consisting of :— Hon'ble Mr. Justice S. Ravindra Bhat, Chairman Hon'ble Mr. Justice S. N. Dhingra, Member Hon'ble Mr. Justice P. K. Bhasin, Member 2. With effect from 27th June, 2010, the Advisory Board already constituted vide the aforesaid Notification dated 16th March, 2010 shall continue to function. [F. No. 674/1/2005-Cus.-VIII] A. K. SHARMA, Under Secy. Foot Note :— The Notification No. G.S.R. 195(E) dated 16th March, 2010 was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (i) on the 17th March, 2010.
